title: Mouse Traps Mice Traps, 6 Pack Mouse Traps For Indoors That Kill Instantly, Rodent Trap, Mice Kill Mouse Control
features: EFFICIENT And SENSITIVE: These mouse traps are more effective and safe compared to traditional wood or metal traps. Only 0.025 lbs of weight can trigger the trap. With powerful stainless steel spring, these traps are suitable to catch small mice.
EASY TO SET: The bait cup is easy to set up and is safety . You just need to press the tail of the mouse trap with your hands and the work is done.

SAFE AND HYGIENIC: This trap eliminates the use of fingers to set up like in traditional methods, avoiding any possible injury to your fingers. You also do not have to touch the mouse while removing it
REUSABLE: This rat trap is made of ABS materialwhich is easy to wash, reusable and long lasting. Just simply wash it after capture so you can use it over and over again. No residue, no odor.
No risk purchase: We just want to help you eliminate mouse completely! If you are not satisfied with our product, we will try our best to solve your problem.
description: Product Description WARNINGS: 1. Set the mousetrap with extreme care and avoid pinching your fingers. 2. Keep the mousetrap out of children and pet reach. 3. Never touch the snap with your hands. Use a stick or other tool if you want to loosen the trap. New Generation √ Deteachable cup √ Easy to clean √ Safe to use √ Easy to set √ Sensitive pedal What is the good bait? Peanut butter and hazelnut spread are the most attractive. Their hunger for calories also entices them to try chocolate. Waterproof and easy clean Waterproof material make the mouse trap could be reused for many times. How to set it up correctly? -Please set it up on the plane. -Do not set it up upside down or oblique. -The trap will be damaged under incorrect settings How to Use this Mice Trap? 1.Do not place the mouse trap close to the wall. 2. Please place the mouse trap 1cm away from the wall and it will works more functional. 3. Not forget to press the clip and open it.
